variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16285 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16285 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16285 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P137285 Air Filter, Safety Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16285
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P137285 Air Filter, Safety Konepac is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
